Class SignUpUI

java.lang.Object
UI.SignUpUI
public class SignUpUI extends Object
Handles the user interface for the registration process.

Validates new user data, creates User and UserProfile records, and persists them.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

  • Method Details

    • start

      public User start()
      Starts the registration process.
      Returns:
      null as registration result is accessed via getter

    • displayForm

      public void displayForm()
      Displays the sign-up form and prompts for user details.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this UI component.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      the string "SignUpUI"

    • validateInput

      public boolean validateInput(String email, String password)
      Validates the format of the provided email and password.
      Parameters:
      email - the email to check
      password - the password to check
      Returns:
      true if valid

    • register

      public User register(String fullName, String email, String password)
      Creates and registers a new user in the system.
      Parameters:
      fullName - the new user's full name
      email - the new user's email
      password - the new user's password
      Returns:
      the created User, or null if registration failed

    • submitRegistration

      public void submitRegistration()
      Displays a success message upon completed registration.

    • showError

      public void showError(String message)
      Displays an error message upon failed registration.
      Parameters:
      message - the error message to display

    • getRegisteredUser

      public User getRegisteredUser()
      Retrieves the newly registered user, if successful.
      Returns:
      the User object
